description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named AMR-Wind Lint that runs on push to main branch and on pull requests to main. The workflow should trigger on changes to specific paths including cmake, amr-wind, submods, unit_tests, CMakeLists.txt, and .github/workflows/lint.yml. Run two jobs, cppcheck on macos-latest and clang-tidy on ubuntu-latest, each with steps to cancel previous runs, checkout code, install dependencies, configure, and run static analysis checks.
